title: PDF → Word
desc: Convert PDF to editable DOCX using pdf2docx/LibreOffice.

title: Word → PDF
desc: Convert DOC/DOCX to PDF using LibreOffice or equivalent.

title: PDF Merge
desc: Merge multiple PDF files into one PDF.

title: PDF Split
desc: Split a PDF into single-page or custom-page-range PDFs.

title: Remove Pages (PDF)
desc: Remove selected pages from a PDF and repackage.

title: PDF → PNG
desc: Convert PDF pages to PNG images using pdftoppm or ImageMagick.

title: PDF → JPG
desc: Extract pages or convert whole PDF pages to JPG images.

title: DOCX → PNG
desc: Export DOCX pages as PNG images (one PNG per page).

title: PDF Compress
desc: Compress PDF files to reduce file size while preserving quality.

title: Compress Image
desc: Lossy or lossless compression for JPG/PNG/WEBP images.

title: Image → Text (OCR)
desc: Run OCR on images (JPG/PNG/PDF) to extract selectable text.

title: JPG → PDF
desc: Convert JPG / JPEG images into a single or single-page PDF.

title: PNG → PDF
desc: Convert PNG images to PDF files.

title: PNG → JPG
desc: Convert PNG images to JPG format and optionally compress.

title: JPG → PNG
desc: Convert JPG images to PNG format while preserving quality.

title: WEBP → PNG
desc: Convert WebP images to PNG for compatibility.

title: PNG → WEBP
desc: Convert PNG images to WebP to reduce file size.

title: PDF Repair
desc: Attempt to repair corrupted PDF files and recover content.

title: PDF → Text
desc: Extract plain text from PDF documents using pdftotext.

title: PPT → PDF
desc: Convert PPT/PPTX presentations into PDF files.

title: PDF → PPT
desc: Convert PDF pages to PPT slides where possible.

title: PPT → Images
desc: Convert PowerPoint slides into JPG/PNG images.

title: DOCX → TXT
desc: Extract plain text from DOCX files.

title: TXT → PDF
desc: Convert plain text files into printable PDF documents.

title: HTML → PDF
desc: Render HTML pages or files into a PDF snapshot.

title: Markdown → HTML
desc: Convert Markdown (.md) to HTML pages.

title: HTML → Markdown
desc: Convert simple HTML into Markdown format.

title: SVG → PNG
desc: Rasterize SVG vector images to PNG format.

title: SVG → JPG
desc: Convert SVG files to JPG images.

title: ZIP → TAR
desc: Convert ZIP archive to TAR archive.

title: TAR → ZIP
desc: Convert TAR or TAR.GZ archives into ZIP files.

title: RAR → ZIP
desc: Convert RAR archives to ZIP for broader compatibility.

title: HEIC → JPG
desc: Convert Apple HEIC images to JPG for compatibility.

title: JPG → HEIC
desc: Convert JPG images to HEIC (useful for storage/quality).

title: Resize Image
desc: Resize images to specified dimensions while preserving aspect ratio.

title: Rotate Image
desc: Rotate images by 90/180/270 degrees or custom angle.

title: Crop Image
desc: Crop images to a selected bounding box or preset size.

title: Remove PDF Password
desc: Attempt to remove password from encrypted PDF (if permitted).

title: Add PDF Password
desc: Encrypt a PDF with a password for distribution.

title: OCR PDF → Word
desc: Perform OCR on scanned PDF and output editable DOCX.

title: PPTX → PDF
desc: Convert PPTX specifically to PDF (preserves layout).

title: DOC → DOCX
desc: Upgrade old DOC files to modern DOCX format.

title: Merge Images → PDF
desc: Combine multiple image files into a single PDF.

title: Split PDF → Images
desc: Export each page of a PDF as an image (JPEG/PNG).

title: Extract Images from PDF
desc: Extract embedded images from a PDF file.

title: EPUB → MOBI
desc: Convert ebook formats between EPUB and MOBI for e-readers.

title: MOBI → EPUB
desc: Convert MOBI ebooks to EPUB.

title: Excel → CSV
desc: Convert XLS/XLSX spreadsheets into CSV format.

title: CSV → Excel
desc: Convert CSV files into XLSX spreadsheets.

title: XLS → XLSX
desc: Convert legacy XLS files into modern XLSX format.

title: XLSX → XLS
desc: Convert XLSX files back to XLS if needed.

title: CSV → JSON
desc: Convert tabular CSV data into structured JSON.

title: JSON → CSV
desc: Flatten JSON arrays/objects into CSV tables.

title: OCR Image → Word
desc: Run OCR on images and return editable DOCX file.

title: Compress Archive
desc: Re-compress archives (zip/tar) with different compression levels.

title: Remove Metadata (Image)
desc: Strip EXIF/GPS metadata from images for privacy.

title: Add Watermark (Image)
desc: Add text or image watermark to photos.

title: Add Watermark (PDF)
desc: Overlay text or image watermark on PDF pages.

title: Image → SVG (Trace)
desc: Trace simple raster images into vector SVG (best-effort).

title: SVG → PDF
desc: Convert vector SVG files to PDF format.

title: Image → WebP
desc: Convert images (JPG/PNG) to WebP to save bandwidth.

title: PPTX → Images
desc: Export PPTX slides as JPG/PNG images.

title: OCR Multi-page TIFF
desc: Perform OCR on multi-page TIFFs to extract text or produce searchable PDF.

title: VCF → CSV
desc: Convert contact VCF files to CSV for spreadsheets.

title: CSV → VCF
desc: Create VCF contact files from CSV contact lists.

title: PDF → Searchable PDF
desc: OCR scanned PDF and embed searchable text layer.

title: ISO → ZIP
desc: Extract ISO filesystem and repackage as ZIP (files only).

title: ZIP → ISO
desc: Create bootable or non-bootable ISO from folder/zip contents.

title: PDF → SVG
desc: Convert single-page PDFs or vector pages to SVG (best-effort).

title: JSON → XML
desc: Convert JSON object/array to equivalent XML representation.

title: XML → JSON
desc: Convert XML documents to JSON format.
